item.title: AI is so crazy! The perfect digital singer who cloned Dili, is the person going to lose his job?
item.itunes:title: AI is so crazy! The perfect digital singer who cloned Dili, is the person going to lose his job?
item.itunes:author: 無遠弗屆教學教室
item.itunes:summary:
# Developing AI literacy

# Speedy customized XiaoIce digital human

# Xiaobing Digital Human APP level customization

# Price of XiaoIce Digital Human

# AI master training camp

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m0nT5BD5Sng

Web page description: https://gogoplus.net/?p=15025

AI master training camp: https://gogoplus.net/aicourse

One book to handle generative AI purchases: https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010992875

Xiaoice Digital Man

Register Clone Ai URL: https://clone.iiii.com/login/9LrJ7e

The 10% off discount code is as follows: mrgogo

00:00 Use Xiaoice Digital People to create your own artists

04:53 Developing AI literacy

06:57 Speedy customized XiaoIce digital human

07:42 Xiaobing Digital Human APP level customization

11:37 Price of XiaoIce Digital Human

19:02 AI master training camp

How to use AI to create a virtual singer - Applications of SunoAI, ChatGPT, Xiaobing Digital Human and Face Fusion

With the help of AI technology, I completed a virtual singer's work called \"Homesick for the Bright Moon\". The song's creation process used SunoAI and ChatGPT to generate lyrics and melody, and then used Xiaobing's digital human to create a lifelike virtual singer.

Creation of SunoAI + ChatGPT

Through SunoAI, I was able to simulate real singing voices, and ChatGPT helped me create emotional homesickness lyrics. The song \"Missing the Bright Moon\" combines the advantages of these two powerful tools and demonstrates the potential of AI music creation.

Application of Xiaoice Digital Human

XiaoIce Digital Human allows me to easily create a virtual singer image and sing songs in the form of a virtual human. If you also want to create your own virtual singer, you can click on the following link: Xiaobing Digital Man, and use the discount code mrgogo to enjoy a 10% discount.

Using Face Fusion technology

I also used Face Fusion to replace the face of the virtual singer with my favorite star - Dilireba. This way I have my own AI artist, and this virtual singer will never get tired and can be there for me anytime, anywhere. Creation and performance.

The advancement of AI technology allows us to create our own virtual singers and is no longer limited to traditional music creation. If you are also interested in AI music, come and give it a try and create your own virtual artist!

#virtual singer #AI music creation #SunoAI #ChatGPT #小冰digital person #FaceFusion #virtual artist #AI technology #virtual performance #Dilraba #digital person #AI ​​singer #virtual music #future technology #creative music #virtual singing

#virtual singer, #AI music creation, #SunoAI, #ChatGPT, #小冰digital person, #FaceFusion, #virtual artist, #AI technology, #virtual performance, #Dilraba, #digital person, #AI singer, #virtualmusic, #futuretechnology, #creativemusic, #virtualsinging

AI uses your voice to create lyrics and music. People who are tone-deaf can also rely on AI to realize their dream of becoming a singer. SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT

https://youtu.be/9nHbw0eUJeE

The first all-AI single \"Past\" RVC clones my voice + ChatGPT + Suno AI to fulfill my dream of becoming a singer, like and subscribe to join Lline @wuyuan The official account will provide tutorials

https://youtu.be/EfzN0HgDDgk

AI movie trailer production! Detailed instruction on the whole process! 0 Basics AI script + AI video + AI + video + editing Runway | ChatGPT | Canva AI

https://youtu.be/BPhCrfAlWZo

LivePortrait super simple AI magic! Turn still photos into moving videos with LivePortrait

https://youtu.be/ghAQ-srGpLw

Breaking through the limits of AI video! Runway Gen-3 Alpha competes with SORA to bring super realism. Sora can’t wait, Gen3 Alpha is the first to use it.

https://youtu.be/SAxZB7wUWYo

Free image generation Fooocus with consistent faces, unlimited pictures, and seizing AI virtual influencer business opportunities Fooocus Midjourney Stable Diffusion

https://youtu.be/jcMYyeNE6wc

Free Pinokio AI easily installs a variety of AI open source software - this episode demonstrates how to install a face-changing program with one click Facefusion Mac/Win - Pinokio subverts your imagination

https://youtu.be/gJa_ATlUdsY

[Beinong’s wonderful speech] GOGO’s basic AI course and AI teaching suitable for seniors. This basic course is suitable for seniors and beginners! Teaching ChatGPT3.5 free version | ChatGPT APP

https://youtu.be/VaFRD2A1ykc

[Completely free, guaranteed to learn] AI song creation allows you to have Jay Chou’s talent in seconds! ChatGPT | Suno.ai

https://youtu.be/I4r6H3EaBxs

[AI Clone Sound] The three best ways to use AI to copy sounds | Clone Sound | GPT SoVits | Cutting | Cutting Pro | ElevenLabs

https://youtu.be/_IKIbeebhFA

[Teaching Face Changing by Yourself 1] In what industries can free AI face changing technology be used? Actors in this episode Twice Zhou Ziyu | Altman | Lai Qingde | Ke Wenzhe | Hou Youyi

https://youtu.be/uJr0BnUTUak

[AI Face Changing Tutorial 2] Master AI Face Changing Technology for Free: The Ultimate Guide to Face Fusion! Roop | Swapface | AKOOL | DeepFaceLive

https://youtu.be/T1rjd_0Ls4U
item.description:
# Developing AI literacy

# Speedy customized XiaoIce digital human

# Xiaobing Digital Human APP level customization

# Price of XiaoIce Digital Human

# AI master training camp

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m0nT5BD5Sng

Web page description: https://gogoplus.net/?p=15025

AI master training camp: https://gogoplus.net/aicourse

One book to handle generative AI purchases: https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010992875

Xiaoice Digital Man

Register Clone Ai URL: https://clone.iiii.com/login/9LrJ7e

The 10% off discount code is as follows: mrgogo

00:00 Use Xiaoice Digital People to create your own artists

04:53 Developing AI literacy

06:57 Speedy customized XiaoIce digital human

07:42 Xiaobing Digital Human APP level customization

11:37 Price of XiaoIce Digital Human

19:02 AI master training camp

How to use AI to create a virtual singer - Applications of SunoAI, ChatGPT, Xiaobing Digital Human and Face Fusion

With the help of AI technology, I completed a virtual singer's work called \"Homesick for the Bright Moon\". The song's creation process used SunoAI and ChatGPT to generate lyrics and melody, and then used Xiaobing's digital human to create a lifelike virtual singer.

Creation of SunoAI + ChatGPT

Through SunoAI, I was able to simulate real singing voices, and ChatGPT helped me create emotional homesickness lyrics. The song \"Missing the Bright Moon\" combines the advantages of these two powerful tools and demonstrates the potential of AI music creation.

Application of Xiaoice Digital Human

XiaoIce Digital Human allows me to easily create a virtual singer image and sing songs in the form of a virtual human. If you also want to create your own virtual singer, you can click on the following link: Xiaobing Digital Man, and use the discount code mrgogo to enjoy a 10% discount.

Using Face Fusion technology

I also used Face Fusion to replace the face of the virtual singer with my favorite star - Dilireba. This way I have my own AI artist, and this virtual singer will never get tired and can be there for me anytime, anywhere. Creation and performance.

The advancement of AI technology allows us to create our own virtual singers and is no longer limited to traditional music creation. If you are also interested in AI music, come and give it a try and create your own virtual artist!

#virtual singer #AI music creation #SunoAI #ChatGPT #小冰digital person #FaceFusion #virtual artist #AI technology #virtual performance #Dilraba #digital person #AI ​​singer #virtual music #future technology #creative music #virtual singing

#virtual singer, #AI music creation, #SunoAI, #ChatGPT, #小冰digital person, #FaceFusion, #virtual artist, #AI technology, #virtual performance, #Dilraba, #digital person, #AI singer, #virtualmusic, #futuretechnology, #creativemusic, #virtualsinging

AI uses your voice to create lyrics and music. People who are tone-deaf can also rely on AI to realize their dream of becoming a singer. SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT

https://youtu.be/9nHbw0eUJeE

The first all-AI single \"Past\" RVC clones my voice + ChatGPT + Suno AI to fulfill my dream of becoming a singer, like and subscribe to join Lline @wuyuan The official account will provide tutorials

https://youtu.be/EfzN0HgDDgk

AI movie trailer production! Detailed instruction on the whole process! 0 Basics AI script + AI video + AI + video + editing Runway | ChatGPT | Canva AI

https://youtu.be/BPhCrfAlWZo

LivePortrait super simple AI magic! Turn still photos into moving videos with LivePortrait

https://youtu.be/ghAQ-srGpLw

Breaking through the limits of AI video! Runway Gen-3 Alpha competes with SORA to bring super realism. Sora can’t wait, Gen3 Alpha is the first to use it.

https://youtu.be/SAxZB7wUWYo

Free image generation Fooocus with consistent faces, unlimited pictures, and seizing AI virtual influencer business opportunities Fooocus Midjourney Stable Diffusion

https://youtu.be/jcMYyeNE6wc

Free Pinokio AI easily installs a variety of AI open source software - this episode demonstrates how to install a face-changing program with one click Facefusion Mac/Win - Pinokio subverts your imagination

https://youtu.be/gJa_ATlUdsY

[Beinong’s wonderful speech] GOGO’s basic AI course and AI teaching suitable for seniors. This basic course is suitable for seniors and beginners! Teaching ChatGPT3.5 free version | ChatGPT APP

https://youtu.be/VaFRD2A1ykc

[Completely free, guaranteed to learn] AI song creation allows you to have Jay Chou’s talent in seconds! ChatGPT | Suno.ai

https://youtu.be/I4r6H3EaBxs

[AI Clone Sound] The three best ways to use AI to copy sounds | Clone Sound | GPT SoVits | Cutting | Cutting Pro | ElevenLabs

https://youtu.be/_IKIbeebhFA

[Teaching Face Changing by Yourself 1] In what industries can free AI face changing technology be used? Actors in this episode Twice Zhou Ziyu | Altman | Lai Qingde | Ke Wenzhe | Hou Youyi

https://youtu.be/uJr0BnUTUak

[AI Face Changing Tutorial 2] Master AI Face Changing Technology for Free: The Ultimate Guide to Face Fusion! Roop | Swapface | AKOOL | DeepFaceLive

https://youtu.be/T1rjd_0Ls4U

# Developing AI literacy

# Speedy customized XiaoIce digital human

# Xiaobing Digital Human APP level customization

# Price of XiaoIce Digital Human

# AI master training camp

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=m0nT5BD5Sng

Web page description: https://gogoplus.net/?p=15025

AI master training camp: https://gogoplus.net/aicourse

One book to handle generative AI purchases: https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010992875

Xiaoice Digital Man

Register Clone Ai URL: https://clone.iiii.com/login/9LrJ7e

The 10% off discount code is as follows: mrgogo

00:00 Use Xiaoice Digital People to create your own artists

04:53 Developing AI literacy

06:57 Speedy customized XiaoIce digital human

07:42 Xiaobing Digital Human APP level customization

11:37 Price of XiaoIce Digital Human

19:02 AI master training camp

How to use AI to create a virtual singer - Applications of SunoAI, ChatGPT, Xiaobing Digital Human and Face Fusion

With the help of AI technology, I completed a virtual singer's work called \"Homesick for the Bright Moon\". The song's creation process used SunoAI and ChatGPT to generate lyrics and melody, and then used Xiaobing's digital human to create a lifelike virtual singer.

Creation of SunoAI + ChatGPT

Through SunoAI, I was able to simulate real singing voices, and ChatGPT helped me create emotional homesickness lyrics. The song \"Missing the Bright Moon\" combines the advantages of these two powerful tools and demonstrates the potential of AI music creation.

Application of Xiaoice Digital Human

XiaoIce Digital Human allows me to easily create a virtual singer image and sing songs in the form of a virtual human. If you also want to create your own virtual singer, you can click on the following link: Xiaobing Digital Man, and use the discount code mrgogo to enjoy a 10% discount.

Using Face Fusion technology

I also used Face Fusion to replace the face of the virtual singer with my favorite star - Dilireba. This way I have my own AI artist, and this virtual singer will never get tired and can be there for me anytime, anywhere. Creation and performance.

The advancement of AI technology allows us to create our own virtual singers and is no longer limited to traditional music creation. If you are also interested in AI music, come and give it a try and create your own virtual artist!

item.title: 震撼登場！首位虛擬歌手 台版迪麗熱巴 發布超清新單曲 "思鄉月光" | Suno AI + 小冰數字人 創造數位奇蹟！
item.itunes:title: 震撼登場！首位虛擬歌手 台版迪麗熱巴 發布超清新單曲 "思鄉月光" | Suno AI + 小冰數字人 創造數位奇蹟！
item.itunes:author: 無遠弗屆教學教室
item.itunes:summary:

item.title: AI 用你的聲音創建歌詞曲 五音不全的人也可以靠AI實現當歌手的夢想 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT #ai #翻唱 #chatgpt #sunoai #ai創作
item.itunes:title: AI 用你的聲音創建歌詞曲 五音不全的人也可以靠AI實現當歌手的夢想 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT #ai #翻唱 #chatgpt #sunoai #ai創作

item.title: AI 用你的聲音創建歌詞曲 五音不全的人也可以靠AI實現當歌手的夢想 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT
item.itunes:title: AI 用你的聲音創建歌詞曲 五音不全的人也可以靠AI實現當歌手的夢想 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT
item.itunes:author: 無遠弗屆教學教室
item.itunes:summary:
# GoGo最新單曲 \"過往\"

# AI素養 養成

# 教學下載 RVC WebUI

# 教學ChatGPT SunoAI創建歌詞曲

# AI高手訓練營課程介紹

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9nHbw0eUJeE

網頁說明: https://gogoplus.net/?p=14966

AI高手訓練營: https://gogoplus.net/aicourse

一本搞定生成式AI購買: https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010992875

在這支影片中，我們探討如何利用 AI 技術，即使五音不全的人也能創作屬於自己的歌曲，實現成為歌手的夢想。我們會示範如何使用 SunoAI、RVC WebUI 以及 ChatGPT 來創建原創歌詞和曲目，並將它們轉化為具備個人聲音特色的成品。

你將學到：

SunoAI：如何利用這個工具快速生成旋律和背景音樂。

RVC WebUI：如何用這個簡單的網頁介面，將你自己或其他人的聲音，無縫地融入歌曲當中。

ChatGPT：如何讓 AI 幫助你創作歌詞，無論你是否擅長寫作。

這支影片是給所有熱愛音樂、希望利用 AI 創造屬於自己作品的人而設，無論你是音樂新手還是資深音樂人，都能從中找到靈感並學會如何使用這些工具來實現你的創作夢想。

關鍵字：

#ai #音樂創作 #sunoai #RVC WebUI #chatgpt #五音不全 #成為歌手 #創作歌詞 #原創音樂 #AI 幫助創作 #數位聲音生成 #AI素養

00:00 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT說明

00:45 GoGo最新單曲 \"過往\"

04:27 AI素養 養成

05:59 教學下載 RVC WebUI

14:49 教學ChatGPT SunoAI創建歌詞曲

25:49 AI高手訓練營課程介紹

一本搞定生成式AI購買: https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010992875

在這支影片中，我們探討如何利用 AI 技術，即使五音不全的人也能創作屬於自己的歌曲，實現成為歌手的夢想。我們會示範如何使用 SunoAI、RVC WebUI 以及 ChatGPT 來創建原創歌詞和曲目，並將它們轉化為具備個人聲音特色的成品。

你將學到：

SunoAI：如何利用這個工具快速生成旋律和背景音樂。

RVC WebUI：如何用這個簡單的網頁介面，將你自己或其他人的聲音，無縫地融入歌曲當中。

ChatGPT：如何讓 AI 幫助你創作歌詞，無論你是否擅長寫作。

這支影片是給所有熱愛音樂、希望利用 AI 創造屬於自己作品的人而設，無論你是音樂新手還是資深音樂人，都能從中找到靈感並學會如何使用這些工具來實現你的創作夢想。

關鍵字：

#ai #音樂創作 #sunoai #RVC WebUI #chatgpt #五音不全 #成為歌手 #創作歌詞 #原創音樂 #AI 幫助創作 #數位聲音生成 #AI素養

00:00 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT說明

00:45 GoGo最新單曲 \"過往\"

04:27 AI素養 養成

05:59 教學下載 RVC WebUI

14:49 教學ChatGPT SunoAI創建歌詞曲

item.content:encoded:
# GoGo最新單曲 \"過往\"

# AI素養 養成

# 教學下載 RVC WebUI

# 教學ChatGPT SunoAI創建歌詞曲

# AI高手訓練營課程介紹

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9nHbw0eUJeE

網頁說明: https://gogoplus.net/?p=14966

AI高手訓練營: https://gogoplus.net/aicourse

一本搞定生成式AI購買: https://www.books.com.tw/products/0010992875

在這支影片中，我們探討如何利用 AI 技術，即使五音不全的人也能創作屬於自己的歌曲，實現成為歌手的夢想。我們會示範如何使用 SunoAI、RVC WebUI 以及 ChatGPT 來創建原創歌詞和曲目，並將它們轉化為具備個人聲音特色的成品。

你將學到：

SunoAI：如何利用這個工具快速生成旋律和背景音樂。

RVC WebUI：如何用這個簡單的網頁介面，將你自己或其他人的聲音，無縫地融入歌曲當中。

ChatGPT：如何讓 AI 幫助你創作歌詞，無論你是否擅長寫作。

這支影片是給所有熱愛音樂、希望利用 AI 創造屬於自己作品的人而設，無論你是音樂新手還是資深音樂人，都能從中找到靈感並學會如何使用這些工具來實現你的創作夢想。

關鍵字：

#ai #音樂創作 #sunoai #RVC WebUI #chatgpt #五音不全 #成為歌手 #創作歌詞 #原創音樂 #AI 幫助創作 #數位聲音生成 #AI素養

00:00 SunoAI + RVC WebUI + ChatGPT說明
